title: comms.recentLog
description: Tool I/O contract for the first comms-mcp vertical tool. 'Recent communications with person X', fusing late-bound MessagesProvider bindings (quo+imessage+email) into one time-ordered UnifiedCommsEntry[] log. The vertical OWNS the cross-canonical fan-out (ALCHEMICAL_PROMOTION.md §3): no single home service owns quo+imessage+email together. Migrates imessage_unified_with_quo here off the imessage primitive. @canon: chittycanon://gov/governance#core-types

Input.description: Exactly one contact selector is required (oneOf).

person.description: ChittyID of the counterparty Person (T=P). Preferred selector — resolves to all known endpoints across channels. @canon core-types: P.

identifier.description: Raw endpoint when no ChittyID is known yet: E.164 phone (+13122186717) or email. The combo's resolveContact fans this out to sibling identifiers.

channels.description: Which channels to fuse. Each maps to a bound MessagesProvider. Omitted => all bound providers. Adding a 4th channel = appending an enum value + binding one provider; the merge/sort/output are untouched (see drift note).

days.description: Lookback window in days. Mutually exclusive with explicit since/until.

limit.description: Max merged entries returned (post-merge, across all channels).

order.description: Time order of the merged log. desc = most-recent-first.

includeBody.description: Hydrate full body via getMessage where the list op returned only snippets (costs extra provider round-trips).

entries.description: Time-ordered fused log. Each item validates against UnifiedCommsEntry.

resolvedContact.description: How the input selector resolved. Honest about partial resolution — chittyId may be null if only a raw identifier matched.

channelsQueried.description: Per-channel fetch result — surfaces partial failure instead of hiding it (no silent fallback). A channel whose backend is down reports ok=false with the error, and the merged log still returns the channels that succeeded.

reshapedBy.description: Whether codemode reused a cached rawToUnified or regenerated it for this provider (ALCHEMICAL_PROMOTION.md §4).
